thought.text: Now let me run a quick test evaluation on a couple of variance tasks to verify everything works and get data into Weave:

action.command: cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export WANDB_API_KEY="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" && export PINECONE_API_KEY="pcsk_3Vsf8s_UoX9xAA4AzvCu6kJFoAYxMs33WKzL3VdtgMpK2tSQUodh3oVBM62BnSZn22Zgzr" && export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" && python scripts/run_evaluation.py --tasks lr-warmup-scheduler --limit 4 --output output/eval_test.json 2>&1

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export WANDB_API_KEY=\"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\" && export PINECONE_API_KEY=\"pcsk_3Vsf8s_UoX9xAA4AzvCu6kJFoAYxMs33WKzL3VdtgMpK2tSQUodh3oVBM62BnSZn22Zgzr\" && export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=\"$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\" && python scripts/run_evaluation.py --tasks lr-warmup-scheduler --limit 4 --output output/eval_test.json 2>&1", "timeout": 180, "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Run test evaluation on lr-warmup-scheduler task"}
